arguments.command_line: cd /workspace && npm create vite@latest game-2048 -- --template react-ts
cd /workspace/game-2048 && npm install && npm install -D vitest @testing-library/react @testing-library/jest-dom jsdom

arguments.content:
export const BOARD_SIZE = 4

export type TileValue = number
export type CellValue = TileValue | 0
export type Board = CellValue[][]

export type Direction = 'up' | 'down' | 'left' | 'right'

export interface MoveResult {
  board: Board
  scoreDelta: number
  moved: boolean
  won: boolean
}

export interface GameState {
  board: Board
  score: number
  status: string
  won: boolean
  gameOver: boolean
}

interface ScorePanelProps { score: number status: string onRestart: () => void } export function ScorePanel({ score, status, onRestart }: ScorePanelProps) { return (

2048

Combine matching tiles to reach 2048.

Score {score}

{status}

Use arrow keys or WASD to move the tiles.

) }

arguments.command_line: cd /workspace/game-2048 && npm test && npm run build
